from manim import *

class WaterfallModel(Scene):
    def construct(self):
        # Water flowing down
        water_flow = VGroup()
        for i in range(10):
            water_rect = Rectangle(width=1, height=0.5, color=BLUE)
            water_rect.shift(UP * i)
            water_flow.add(water_rect)
        self.play(Create(water_flow), run_time=2)
        self.wait()

        # Water flowing down with increasing height
        self.play(water_flow.animate.shift(UP * 5), run_time=2)
        self.wait()

        # Water flowing down with decreasing height
        self.play(water_flow.animate.shift(DOWN * 5), run_time=2)
        self.wait()

        # Inception of waterfall model
        self.play(water_flow.animate.shift(RIGHT * 5), run_time=2)
        self.wait()

        # Inception of waterfall model with increasing height
        self.play(water_flow.animate.shift(UP * 5), run_time=2)
        self.wait()

        # Inception of waterfall model with decreasing height
        self.play(water_flow.animate.shift(DOWN * 5), run_time=2)
        self.wait()

        # Text description
        text = Text("Waterfall Model", font_size=48)
        text.shift(DOWN * 2)
        self.play(Create(text), run_time=1)
        self.wait()

        # Text description with arrows
        arrow1 = Arrow(start=LEFT, end=RIGHT, buff=0.25)
        arrow1.shift(UP * 2)
        arrow2 = Arrow(start=LEFT, end=RIGHT, buff=0.25)
        arrow2.shift(DOWN * 2)
        self.play(Create(arrow1), Create(arrow2), run_time=1)
        self.wait()
